findings.description: A large full-width image (598.3pt wide, approximately full US-Letter page width) is embedded in the HTML body between the outline listing and Section I. This likely represents a full-page embedded rendering of PDF page 1, duplicating content that already appears as HTML text immediately above it (the memo header, date, To/From/Subject, introductory paragraphs, and outline).
findings.evidence:
HTML: appears directly after the outline text ('I. History/Background … IV. Attachments') and before the

for Section I. No corresponding standalone image exists at that position in the PDF.

findings.description: The second image in the HTML has empty alt text (alt=""). If this is a substantive full-page embedded image of PDF page 1 (as its 598.3pt width suggests), the empty alt provides no information about its content.
